title: Menora Panoramas
description: Replaces the Minecraft menu panorama with a custom panorama image.
body:
# Menora 
### is an ongoing panorama project that replaces the Minecraft main menu with custom-made panorama images.

The goal is to build a growing collection of atmospheric scenes – from peaceful landscapes and cozy vibes to dark environments, along with the occasional inside jokes from my Twitch and YouTube content.
While the first panorama currently features a reference to my Minecraft project Hyklos³, the main focus remains on creating versatile and widely appealing menu panoramas.

More coming soon!

![Bild1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be211a5162474c089bb870c6acb337cc0eeb6874_0.webp)

If you have panorama suggestions or run into any issues, feel free to message me on Discord – my username is **heylado**.
